summaryText: Duplicate control, Twisted Fusion movement, and Shadow Nova coverage stayed stable into Phase 2.

briefInsights.summary: Duplicate control, Twisted Fusion movement, and Shadow Nova coverage stayed stable into Phase 2.
briefInsights.evidence: The synchronized phase stayed controlled through the kill.
confidenceReasons: The twins encounter is defined by Duplicate control and Twisted Fusion movement.
The reviewed fixtures expect coordination-first language on this boss.
briefInsights.recommendation: Keep the same duplicate assignments, beam discipline, and raid-CD plan.

briefInsights.summary: Throughput is below the level needed for a clean progression pull.
briefInsights.evidence: 270K estimated DPS gap across the biggest underperformers.
confidenceReasons: 2 low performers are driving the gap.
270K total estimated DPS is missing from the top offenders.
The throughput pressure is most relevant in Phase 1: Twin Assault.
briefInsights.recommendation: Review uptime, potion usage, and burst alignment before the next pull.

playerCoaching.summary: Tank swap and external timing still need cleanup.
playerCoaching.evidence: No explicit tank swap or external plan is defined.
confidenceReasons: A tank-assignment failure was detected in the pull.
playerCoaching.recommendation: Never have same boss for more than 3 strikes

playerCoaching.summary: Ioboma needs cleaner melee uptime without greedy deaths.

playerCoaching.recommendation: Keep uptime high, but stop trading melee greed for deaths or dropped mechanics.

playerCoaching.summary: Jormungandr needs cleaner movement and uptime discipline.
confidenceReasons: Jormungandr active time is 59%.
Jormungandr died 1 time(s).
playerCoaching.recommendation: Move earlier, keep casting lanes cleaner, and stop losing uptime to late reactions.

phaseSuccessCriteria.summary: Phase 1: Twin Assault is failing on duplicate control or beam movement.
phaseSuccessCriteria.evidence: Key checks: Twin Strike, Void Link, Shadow Nova (Vaelgor), Essence Drain (Ezzorak). Deaths 3, avoidable 0.

phaseSuccessCriteria.summary: Phase 2: Dark Synchronization met the minimum execution bar.
phaseSuccessCriteria.evidence: No major avoidable failures or raid-CD gaps were detected. Key mechanics covered: Twin Strike, Twisted Fusion, Duplicate.

causeChains: Duplicate control stayed stable -> Twisted Fusion movement stayed clean -> Shadow Nova coverage carried the synchronized phase.
